top_signals.title: Takaichi holds key to breaking parliament deadlock
top_signals.summary: Political maneuvering is expected to intensify, with less than two weeks to go before the current parliament session ends on July 17.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
